name: Chili-Cheese Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Layer the first three ingredients.
2. Beat together the egg, flour, water, and tomato sauce in a bowl.
3. Pour the mixture over the cheese and chilies.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit until the cheese melts.
5. Pour one can of Hunt's Special tomato sauce over the cheese mixture.
6. Cook until the sauce bubbles.
